program: v18 (program_v18.md) - v17 base + Swamy local-exploration upgrade
v18_anchor_concentration_observation: v18 anchor-local sampling intentionally concentrates on expert-manifold slots {S14, S15, S16, S20} (22 of 25 = 88% of selected_25). Plus 3 discovery candidates on S03, S04, S07. This is the v18 design: the empirical INVESTIGATIVE_SURVIVING manifold lives in these 4 slots; concentrating mass there is the entire upgrade. Coverage profile is NARROW by design.
policy_update_for_E38_rationale: v18 anchor-local candidates inherit slot from anchor. Coverage-bias does NOT apply to anchor-local mode. Discovery candidates (if any in E38) may use coverage-bias for slot selection. With 10 active anchors at end of E37, the per-anchor budget becomes 10; discovery may be squeezed to 0.
